summary: Iteration 179: Black Screen Bug Fix & Inviter Modal Changes Testing Complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Dashboard loads without errors, no black screen, no ErrorBoundary error screen, inviter modal correctly NOT shown for admin users, Affiliate Center page works, Admin Members page shows Inviter field in view mode.
critical_code_review_comments: useEffect import was missing in InviterModal.jsx - fixed. This caused React to crash and unmount the entire tree (black screen).
ErrorBoundary now wraps the entire App to catch future React crashes and show recovery screen instead of blank page.
sessionStorage is used for inviter modal dismissal (inviter_modal_dismissed_{userId}), so modal shows once per session for all non-admin members.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 179 verified: 1) Black screen bug FIXED - useEffect import was missing in InviterModal.jsx, causing React crash. 2) ErrorBoundary wraps entire App (data-testid='error-boundary-reload' for recovery button). 3) Inviter modal shows once per SESSION (sessionStorage key: inviter_modal_dismissed_{userId}) for all non-admin members. 4) POST /api/referrals/set-inviter now allows re-setting inviter (removed already-set check). 5) Self-referral still rejected with 400. 6) GET /api/referrals/tracking returns referred_by and referred_by_user_id. 7) Login response includes referred_by in user object. 8) Admin Members page: view mode shows 'Inviter' field with data-testid='member-inviter-display'. 9) Affiliate Center page works: 'Invite Someone' card + 'Find a Member' lookup.

admin_login_success.notes: Admin logs in, returns access_token and user

set_inviter_allows_resetting.notes: Endpoint no longer blocks re-setting inviter

lookup_members_works.notes: Returns results with id, name, masked_email

frontend_dashboard_no_black_screen.notes: Dashboard loads successfully, no ErrorBoundary error

frontend_inviter_modal_not_shown_for_adm.notes: Inviter modal NOT shown for master_admin

frontend_affiliate_center_works.notes: Invite Someone card + Find a Member visible

frontend_admin_member_inviter_field.notes: Inviter field shows 'Not set' in member detail dialog

verified_features.black_screen_fix: FIXED - useEffect import added to InviterModal.jsx
verified_features.error_boundary: WORKING - wraps App, shows recovery screen with 'Reload App' button
verified_features.inviter_modal_session_storage: WORKING - shows once per session for non-admin members
verified_features.set_inviter_resetting: WORKING - no longer blocks re-setting inviter (removed already-set check)
verified_features.self_referral_prevention: WORKING - Returns 400 when inviter_id == current user
verified_features.login_referred_by: WORKING - Login response includes referred_by field
verified_features.affiliate_center: WORKING - Invite Someone card + Find a Member lookup
verified_features.admin_member_inviter_field: WORKING - Inviter field visible in member detail dialog
